setup.title: First-Time Setup

setupConfig.emailConfirm: Require Email Confirmation For New Registrations

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your profile and tournament tools.
register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Register as a player to manage profile and decklists.
profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage companion app identity and your decklists.
admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Maintainers can create tournaments and add match records.
admin.manageTournamentsHint: Edit tournament details or continue to delete confirmation.
admin.deleteTournamentConfirm: Delete this tournament and all related entries?
admin.deleteTournamentStep2Hint: Step 2/2: Confirm deletion. This removes the tournament and all related entries.
admin.deleteTournamentTypeNameHint: Type the exact tournament name to confirm deletion.
admin.savedDecklistHint: If selected, this deck will be used instead of manual deck text.
admin.playerName: Player Name (required when no user selected)
admin.companionAppsHint: Create apps for user profile dropdown. Default app is Companion.
admin.registrationPolicyHint: Choose whether new users must verify their email before first login.
admin.assignRolesHint: Admins can promote users to maintainer/admin.
admin.mapAliasHint: Link old text names from previous tournaments to registered users.
admin.newsCreateHint: Maintainers and admins can publish updates for the home news section.
admin.newsImageHint: PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF up to 5MB.
admin.footerSlugHint: Used in URL as /pages/<slug>. Letters, numbers, and dashes only.
admin.newsEditHint: Update content, image, visibility, and publish schedule.
admin.newsManageHint: Browse, review, and edit published or draft articles.
admin.tournamentPageHint: Create tournaments and review existing events.
admin.entriesPageHint: Record player tournament results on this page.
admin.importCompanionResultsHint: Upload a final standings screenshot to auto-create entries with W-L-D records.
admin.importCompanionPreviewHint: Check detected players, edit values if needed, uncheck rows to skip, then submit.
admin.importDefaultDeck: Default deck name for imported rows
admin.importDefaultDeckHint: Companion standings do not include deck names, so one deck label is applied to all imported rows.
admin.importScreenshotImageHint: Upload one or more clear final-standings screenshots (PNG, JPG, WEBP; max 8MB each).
admin.importProgressDetecting: Running OCR and merging detected players...
admin.usersPageHint: Manage users, apps, aliases, and registration settings.
admin.settingsPageHint: Configure website-wide settings and registration policy.
admin.websiteSettingsHint: Control your public website title and shared application settings.
admin.leaderboardSettingsHint: Configure ranking thresholds used for public leaderboard views.
news.title: News
news.subtitle: Latest updates from staff and tournament organizers.

leaderboard.topByWinRateHint: Only players with at least this many events are listed:
